solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    string defangIPaddr(string address) {
        string result;
        for (char c : address) {
            if (c == '.') {
                result += "[.]";
            } else {
                result += c;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through each character of the input string, appending "[.]" for periods and the character itself otherwise. It is efficient with linear time and space complexity, making it suitable for valid IPv4 addresses.
